Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot JarLauncher class path to match the package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Dockerfile.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException at runtime because the class org.springframework.boot.loader.JarLauncher was moved to org.springframework.boot.loader.launch.JarLauncher in Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.13 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with newer libraries required for the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21 features and bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to ensure correct integration between Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to process Lombok-generated getters/setters correctly, leading to compilation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add release configuration to maven-compiler-plugin to enforce Java 21 compilation target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler generates bytecode compatible with Java 21 and enables language features.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Bu.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Bu.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 21 and Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile without the jakarta replacement.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Da.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Da.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Java 21 / Spring Boot 3 environment; the class PostConstruct is now in jakarta.annotation.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Mo.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Mo.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3.x applications targeting Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compile error for the missing import.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.general_idea: Migrate JPA id annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors due to missing symbols.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ut.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ut.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot 3.x property for maximum HTTP request header size.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.why_exists: The property 'server.max-http-header-size' was removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using it results in an 'Invalid configuration property' warning or failure to apply the setting.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Migrate HTTP encoding configuration to Spring Boot 3.x servlet properties.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.why_exists: The properties 'spring.http.encoding.charset' and 'spring.http.encoding.enabled' were removed in Spring Boot 3.x; they must be replaced with 'server.servlet.encoding.*' to maintain UTF-8 encoding behavior.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.before:
spring:
    http:
        encoding:
            charset: UTF-8
            enabled: true

src/main/templates/org/isaqb/onlinetrain.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the Generated annotation from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE standards in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/templates/org/isaqb/onlinetrain.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21, causing a compilation error due to missing class.
